synopsis: Collects material from (not listed in reading order) Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds (1996) #1-2, The Empire Strikes Back Monthly (UK) (1980) #149, 151, & 153-157, Pizzazz (1977) #1-16, Star Wars 3-D (1987) #1-3, Star Wars Weekly (UK) (1978) #60, 94-99, 104-115, Star Wars Monthly (UK) (1982) #159, Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (1996) AMT/ERTL, and Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (1996) Galoob
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1
